import os,json,uuid,boto3,urllib.request
from datetime import datetime,timezone
SB_URL=os.environ["SUPABASE_URL"];SB_KEY=os.environ["SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY"]
AUTOFIXABLE={"HEALTH_DOWN","HEALTH_DEGRADED","REALITY_DRIFT"}
def sb(m,p,d=None):
    req=urllib.request.Request(f"{SB_URL}/rest/v1/{p}",data=json.dumps(d).encode() if d else None,method=m)
    req.add_header("apikey",SB_KEY);req.add_header("Authorization",f"Bearer {SB_KEY}")
    req.add_header("Content-Type","application/json");req.add_header("Prefer","return=representation")
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as r: return json.loads(r.read())
def lambda_handler(event,context):
    d=event.get("detail",{});site_id=d.get("site_id");slug=d.get("slug");v=d.get("violation_code")
    af=v in AUTOFIXABLE
    sb("POST","ops_site_action_queue",{"id":str(uuid.uuid4()),"site_id":site_id,"slug":slug,"action_type":f"AUTOFIX_{v}","severity":"HIGH" if v=="HEALTH_DOWN" else "MEDIUM","title":f"Autofix:{v} on {slug}","detail":json.dumps(d),"status":"OPEN","autofixable":af,"source_event_id":context.aws_request_id,"created_at":datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()})
    return {"queued":1,"slug":slug,"violation":v,"autofixable":af}

import os,json,uuid,boto3,urllib.request
from datetime import datetime,timezone
SB_URL=os.environ["SUPABASE_URL"];SB_KEY=os.environ["SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY"];EB=os.environ["EVENT_BUS_NAME"]
eb=boto3.client("events",region_name="ap-southeast-2")
def sb(m,p,d=None):
    req=urllib.request.Request(f"{SB_URL}/rest/v1/{p}",data=json.dumps(d).encode() if d else None,method=m)
    req.add_header("apikey",SB_KEY);req.add_header("Authorization",f"Bearer {SB_KEY}")
    req.add_header("Content-Type","application/json");req.add_header("Prefer","return=representation")
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as r: return json.loads(r.read())
def lambda_handler(event,context):
    d=event.get("detail",{});site_id=d.get("site_id");slug=d.get("slug")
    rows=sb("GET",f"ops_site_registry?id=eq.{site_id}&select=*") or []
    if not rows: return {"error":"not found"}
    site=rows[0];url=site.get("canonical_url") or site.get("vercel_url");health="UNKNOWN"
    if url:
        try:
            req=urllib.request.Request(url,method="HEAD");req.add_header("User-Agent","t4h/1.0")
            with urllib.request.urlopen(req,timeout=8) as r: health="UP" if r.status<400 else "DOWN"
        except: health="DOWN"
    now=datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
    sb("PATCH",f"ops_site_registry?id=eq.{site_id}",{"health_status":health,"last_checked":now})
    status="COMPLETE" if health=="UP" else "FAILED"
    sb("POST","ops_site_autofix_log",{"id":str(uuid.uuid4()),"site_id":site_id,"slug":slug,"violation_code":"HEALTH_DOWN","requested_fix":"health_refresh","action_status":status,"dry_run":False,"result_message":f"health:{health}","event_id":context.aws_request_id,"created_at":now})
    if health=="UP": eb.put_events(Entries=[{"Source":"t4h.control-tower","DetailType":"SiteAutofixCompleted","Detail":json.dumps({"site_id":site_id,"slug":slug,"result":"RESOLVED"}),"EventBusName":EB}])
    return {"slug":slug,"health":health,"status":status}

import os,json,uuid,boto3,urllib.request
from datetime import datetime,timezone
SB_URL=os.environ["SUPABASE_URL"];SB_KEY=os.environ["SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY"];EB=os.environ["EVENT_BUS_NAME"]
eb=boto3.client("events",region_name="ap-southeast-2")
def sb(m,p,d=None):
    req=urllib.request.Request(f"{SB_URL}/rest/v1/{p}",data=json.dumps(d).encode() if d else None,method=m)
    req.add_header("apikey",SB_KEY);req.add_header("Authorization",f"Bearer {SB_KEY}")
    req.add_header("Content-Type","application/json");req.add_header("Prefer","return=representation")
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as r: return json.loads(r.read())
def lambda_handler(event,context):
    d=event.get("detail",{});site_id=d.get("site_id");slug=d.get("slug")
    now=datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
    sb("PATCH",f"ops_site_registry?id=eq.{site_id}",{"updated_at":now})
    rows=sb("GET",f"ops_site_registry?id=eq.{site_id}&select=reality_status") or [{}]
    new_status=rows[0].get("reality_status","UNKNOWN")
    sb("POST","ops_site_autofix_log",{"id":str(uuid.uuid4()),"site_id":site_id,"slug":slug,"violation_code":"REALITY_DRIFT","requested_fix":"reality_recalc","action_status":"COMPLETE","dry_run":False,"result_message":f"reality:{new_status}","event_id":context.aws_request_id,"created_at":now})
    eb.put_events(Entries=[{"Source":"t4h.control-tower","DetailType":"SiteAutofixCompleted","Detail":json.dumps({"site_id":site_id,"slug":slug,"result":new_status}),"EventBusName":EB}])
    return {"slug":slug,"reality_status":new_status}
